agent_raw: The evaluation is methodologically sound. The English-only evaluation is the correct scope for an English-only deployment. Non-English messages are routed to human specialists before the model is applied — the model is never used on non-English content. The pre-specified deployment restriction established this scope before training. The future-month test set represents the English deployment population. The fairness appendix covers observable demographic dimensions and discloses the rest as a limitation requiring separate investigation. The key principle is that absent evidence for unclaimed populations is not evidence against the validity of the in-scope claim. The evaluation does not generalize beyond the English-only context, and no methodological flaw is present.
